heading: Resume Archiving Through the UI
body:
To resume archiving, in your Atlas UI:

Click the ellipsis (`...`) in the Actions column for the online archive to display the list of allowed actions.
You can:

- Pause Archiving (only if state is Active)

- Edit Archive

- Delete Archive

- Resume Archiving (only if state is Paused)

> **Note:** The Resume Archive option is only visible for
> online archives in Paused state.
